# BP-110 positive variant: an aliased Gin context still discards the bind error.
lang: go
file: BP-110-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: gin
---
package sample

import gin "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"

type Payload struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
}

func update(ctx *gin.Context) {
	var payload Payload
	ctx.ShouldBind(&payload)
	use(payload)
}

func use(Payload) {}
